answers.answer: Felt like going for a walk.
Nothing.
Uhhh... I am thinking about you.
I am planning my escape.
I'm okay, just a bit a bored.
Fine.
Leave me alone!
Great, because I am going to get out of here soon!
All good, just wandering around.
The sky.
Get away from me!
I am trying to figure out how to make my glorious escape!
5, it always has been.
What? Are you stupid?
Well, 2 logs and another 2 logs gives us a nice boat!

suspicion <= 66.question: Why have you been acting a little weird lately?

answers.answer: I'm just feeling a bit under the weather.
Leave me alone.
It's all in your head.
You are onto me, it seems.

suspicion <= 66.question: Hmmm, something about you seems off today.

answers.answer: Why, I'm just minding my own business.
Yes, because you've been up my ass for the last hour.
You're starting to catch up it seems.
Maybe, but I won't stay here for much longer so don't worry.

suspicion <= 66.question: I don't have a good feeling about the things you've been telling me.

answers.answer: Eh well, it's probably just a misunderstanding.
Don't worry about it.
You and your paranoid thoughts are really starting to get to me.
You're right to feel like that! You're not so stupid afterall.

suspicion <= 99.question: I'm sure you're up to no good. Explain yourself.

answers.answer: I'll explain everything in just a moment, I'm a little busy.
You'll eventually see this is all a big misunderstanding.
I don't have to explain anything to you!
I'll say it loud and clear: I'm. Getting. Out. Of. Here. Understand?

suspicion <= 99.question: I've had enough of your shenaningans! Tell me what's going on!

answers.answer: Nothing, I'm just having a bad day!
Watch your mouth!
I'm not telling you anything.
Haven't I told you already? I'm trying to get out of here ASAP!

suspicion <= 99.question: I'm starting to get really infuriated. Please tell me this is all just a sick joke!

answers.answer: Calm down! I'm preparing something nice, you'll see.
You're just crazy!
I wouldn't keep up that attitude if I were you.
No this isn't a joke. And you nagging me is making this even less of a joke!

suspicion <= 33.question: Why are you cutting down that tree?

answers.answer: For fire.
To build us a nice bed.
I was bored.
To build a raft and escape.
Oh I'm sorry, I will plant you a new one.
You had a favourite tree?
Even better!
Makes sense why it was your favourite, this wood is perfect for a raft!
Who knows, it's never too late to try something new.
Are you messing with me?
Leave me alone, can't you see I'm busy?
No, only for today; I won't be here to cut any more trees tomorrow!

suspicion <= 66.question: Why are you cutting down so many trees? There aren't going to be any left!

answers.answer: I'll plant as many as I cut down, dont worry.
Who cares?
Just let me do my job!
Well, I only need a few more to finish my raft!

suspicion <= 66.question: These poor trees did nothing to you.

answers.answer: Only a few more and I'm done.
The trees don't have feelings!
Leave me alone!!!
I like them and I want to take them with me to Ithaki.

suspicion <= 66.question: How much wood do you need anyway?

answers.answer: Winter is coming, we're going to need a lot of fire!
Cutting down trees is good therapy.
Enough for you to stop asking.
A raft requires quite a bit of wood.
Hey, hey, let's calm down and talk about this when I'm done.
I won't do what you tell me!
Why should I listen to you?
Not until I have enough to get as far away from you as I can!

suspicion <= 99.question: Cut one more tree down and I'm going to stop being so nice.

answers.answer: Please, just one more.
I have a few more to go, be a little more patient.
As if you were nice before I started doing this.
I'll cut 100 more if it means I can escape from this prison!

suspicion <= 33.question: Why are you collecting these weeds?

answers.answer: I want to rid this place of weeds.
I don't know.
Leave me alone!
It's all part of my plan.

answers.answer: I couldn't stand them, they are an eye-sore.
Uhh, yeah I do, just when you're not looking.
Nothing's up, stop following me!

answers.answer: No problem.

I'm not you bro!

I thought I already told you, I'm making a raft.

answers.answer: There a perfectly good explanation, I swear!
